upgrades.name: Cargo Bay Extension
upgrades.description: Expands cargo hold by 20 units.

upgrades.name: Fuel Tank Upgrade
upgrades.description: Increases fuel capacity by 30 units.

upgrades.name: Efficient Engines
upgrades.description: Reduces fuel consumption per jump by 2.

upgrades.name: Emergency Thrusters
upgrades.description: Emergency boost system. +15% flee chance in combat.

upgrades.name: Mining Drill Mk2
upgrades.description: Reduces drill time by 20%.

upgrades.name: Advanced Scanner
upgrades.description: Grants 2 additional scan charges for salvaging.

upgrades.name: Salvaged Pulse Emitter
upgrades.description: A jury-rigged energy weapon pulled from scrap. Weak but functional — better than nothing.

combat_move.name: Pulse Shot
combat_move.description: A flickering energy pulse. Low damage, but it gets the job done.

upgrades.name: Mining Laser Retrofit
upgrades.description: A repurposed mining laser that deals moderate damage. Cheap and reliable.

combat_move.name: Mining Laser
combat_move.description: A repurposed mining laser. Decent accuracy, moderate damage.

upgrades.name: Laser Cannon
upgrades.description: Standard combat laser with good accuracy and consistent damage output.

combat_move.name: Laser Cannon
combat_move.description: A focused laser beam. Accurate and reliable.

upgrades.name: Dual Laser Array
upgrades.description: Twin-mounted laser system with synchronized fire control for increased damage.

combat_move.name: Dual Laser Burst
combat_move.description: Fires both lasers in a focused burst.

upgrades.name: Missile Launcher
upgrades.description: High-damage explosive missiles with a cooldown between salvos.

combat_move.name: Missile Salvo
combat_move.description: Launches an explosive missile. High damage, low accuracy.

upgrades.name: Ion Disruptor
upgrades.description: Drains enemy shields while dealing light damage. Effective against shielded targets.

combat_move.name: Ion Blast
combat_move.description: Disrupts shields and deals light damage.

upgrades.name: Plasma Torpedo
upgrades.description: Devastating plasma charge. Extremely powerful but energy-hungry with a long cooldown.

upgrades.name: Basic Shield Generator
upgrades.description: Restores 20 shield points when activated.

upgrades.name: Armor Plating
upgrades.description: Activates reinforced armor, reducing incoming damage by 15% for 2 turns.

upgrades.name: Point Defense System
upgrades.description: Activates point defense, granting +25 evasion for 1 turn.

upgrades.name: Emergency Repair Kit
upgrades.description: Restores 25 hull points. Has a 3-turn cooldown.

upgrades.name: Advanced Shield Array
upgrades.description: Restores 40 shields and grants 10% damage reduction for 2 turns.

combat_move.name: Advanced Shields
combat_move.description: Restores 40 shields + 10% damage reduction for 2 turns.

upgrades.name: Hidden Compartment
upgrades.description: Conceals 30% of cargo capacity in a hidden hold. Lower detection during customs inspections, but double penalties if found.

upgrades.name: Signal Jammer
upgrades.description: Disrupts scanning frequencies. -5% inspection chance on arrival, -3% bounty hunter encounter chance.

upgrades.name: False Transponder
upgrades.description: Broadcasts a fake ship ID. -8% inspection chance on arrival, -5% bounty hunter encounter chance.
